Message:
feat: Add environment variable discovery for all providers

This commit adds comprehensive environment variable discovery for all supported AI providers.

Changes:

- Add DiscoverFromEnvironmentVariables() method to TokenDiscoveryService.cs

- Support 14 providers with 17 different environment variable names

- Add OPENAI to well-known providers list

- Create environment_variables.md documentation guide

- Update data_flow.md with environment variable discovery details

- Update user_manual.md with reference to environment variables

Supported environment variables:

- OPENAI_API_KEY (OpenAI)

- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / CLAUDE_API_KEY (Anthropic)

- GEMINI_API_KEY / GOOGLE_API_KEY (Gemini)

- DEEPSEEK_API_KEY (DeepSeek)

- OPENROUTER_API_KEY (OpenRouter)

- KIMI_API_KEY / MOONSHOT_API_KEY (Kimi)

- XIAOMI_API_KEY / MIMO_API_KEY (Xiaomi)

- MINIMAX_API_KEY (Minimax)

- ZAI_API_KEY / Z_AI_API_KEY (Z.AI)

- ANTIGRAVITY_API_KEY / GOOGLE_ANTIGRAVITY_API_KEY (Antigravity)

- OPENCODE_API_KEY (OpenCode)

- OPENCODE_ZEN_API_KEY (OpenCode Zen)

- CLOUDCODE_API_KEY (CloudCode)

- CODEX_API_KEY (Codex)
